title: Add Docker support for easy deployment
description:
Create Dockerfile and docker-compose.yml for containerized deployment.

Scope:
1. Create optimized multi-stage Dockerfile:
   - Build stage with dependencies
   - Production stage with slim Python image
   - Proper cache management for layers
2. Create docker-compose.yml for local development
3. Add .dockerignore for efficiency
4. Add Docker healthcheck
5. Document Docker usage in README.md

Goal: Enable consistent deployments and easy onboarding for new users.
